org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.api.serialization

## Class SpanningRecordSerializer<T extends [IOReadableWritable](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/core/io/IOReadableWritable.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.core.io")>

  * [java.lang.Object](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/Object.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")
  *     * org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.api.serialization.SpanningRecordSerializer<T>

  * Type Parameters:
    `T` \- The type of the records that are serialized.

All Implemented Interfaces:
    [RecordSerializer](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.api.serialization")<T>

* * *




        public class SpanningRecordSerializer<T extends [IOReadableWritable](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/core/io/IOReadableWritable.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.core.io")>
        extends [Object](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/Object.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")
        implements [RecordSerializer](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.api.serialization")<T>

Record serializer which serializes the complete record to an intermediate data serialization buffer and copies this buffer to target buffers one-by-one using [`copyToBufferBuilder(BufferBuilder)`](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/SpanningRecordSerializer.html#copyToBufferBuilder-org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.buffer.BufferBuilder->).

`[RecordSerializer.SerializationResult](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.SerializationResult.html> "enum in org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.api.serialization")` | `[copyToBufferBuilder](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/SpanningRecordSerializer.html#copyToBufferBuilder-org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.buffer.BufferBuilder->)([BufferBuilder](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/buffer/BufferBuilder.html> "class in org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.buffer") targetBuffer)` Copies an intermediate data serialization buffer into the target BufferBuilder.
`boolean` | `[hasSerializedData](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/SpanningRecordSerializer.html#hasSerializedData-->)()`
`void` | `[prune](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/SpanningRecordSerializer.html#prune-->)()` Clears the buffer and checks to decrease the size of intermediate data serialization buffer after finishing the whole serialization process including [`RecordSerializer.serializeRecord(IOReadableWritable)`](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.html#serializeRecord-T->) and [`RecordSerializer.copyToBufferBuilder(BufferBuilder)`](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.html#copyToBufferBuilder-org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.buffer.BufferBuilder->).

      * #### copyToBufferBuilder

            public [RecordSerializer.SerializationResult](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.SerializationResult.html> "enum in org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.api.serialization") copyToBufferBuilder([BufferBuilder](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/buffer/BufferBuilder.html> "class in org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.buffer") targetBuffer)

Copies an intermediate data serialization buffer into the target BufferBuilder.

Specified by:
    `[copyToBufferBuilder](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.html#copyToBufferBuilder-org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.buffer.BufferBuilder->)` in interface `[RecordSerializer](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.api.serialization")<[T](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/SpanningRecordSerializer.html> "type parameter in SpanningRecordSerializer") extends [IOReadableWritable](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/core/io/IOReadableWritable.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.core.io")>`
Parameters:
    `targetBuffer` \- the target BufferBuilder to copy to
Returns:
    how much information was written to the target buffer and whether this buffer is full
      * #### reset

            public void reset()

Description copied from interface: `[RecordSerializer](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.html#reset-->)`

Supports copying an intermediate data serialization buffer to multiple target buffers by resetting its initial position before each copying.

Specified by:
    `[reset](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.html#reset-->)` in interface `[RecordSerializer](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.api.serialization")<[T](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/SpanningRecordSerializer.html> "type parameter in SpanningRecordSerializer") extends [IOReadableWritable](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/core/io/IOReadableWritable.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.core.io")>`
      * #### prune

            public void prune()

Description copied from interface: `[RecordSerializer](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.html#prune-->)`

Clears the buffer and checks to decrease the size of intermediate data serialization buffer after finishing the whole serialization process including [`RecordSerializer.serializeRecord(IOReadableWritable)`](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.html#serializeRecord-T->) and [`RecordSerializer.copyToBufferBuilder(BufferBuilder)`](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.html#copyToBufferBuilder-org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.buffer.BufferBuilder->).

Specified by:
    `[prune](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.html#prune-->)` in interface `[RecordSerializer](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.api.serialization")<[T](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/SpanningRecordSerializer.html> "type parameter in SpanningRecordSerializer") extends [IOReadableWritable](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/core/io/IOReadableWritable.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.core.io")>`

    `[hasSerializedData](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.html#hasSerializedData-->)` in interface `[RecordSerializer](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/RecordSerializer.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.api.serialization")<[T](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/serialization/SpanningRecordSerializer.html> "type parameter in SpanningRecordSerializer") extends [IOReadableWritable](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/core/io/IOReadableWritable.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.core.io")>`
